name: Duuurp!
description: Duuurp! lobs Torgue rockets in a slow, arcing trajectory. The projectiles hit hard but travel sluggishly, and the launcher suffers from low accuracy, a slow reload, and a low fire rate, making it weaker at longer distances. With a full Torgue setup, the Derp prefix and the Thick Exhaust accessory can push damage higher, but at the cost of even slower firing and heavier recoil. It is a standout common launcher and pairs well with Maya, Axton, or Krieg for reliable health sustain.
